summary: EXP-337 (holistic cross-WIN sweep) authored. Single PATCH-A inserts new <details id="sign-only-non-discrimination"> sibling subsection into data/sections.json ["part2"].html between #axial-symmetry close and #cosmological-cluster open. Names WIN-059/060/066 as canonical sign-only/directional-match cases (NMP-Siberian, SAA westward, NH heat); classifies WIN-058 as adjacent (definitional circularity, cross-linked to Section 2.9). Provides three reusable counters that close the defender pivot for any future sign-only WIN. Closes the cross-WIN systemic issue that EXP-296 (WIN-066 only) flagged but explicitly did not address. Curmudgeon should treat as singleton review (holistic class).
